Text: Simplest create separate submodels for each stage as transitions or operatorPOWLs then create a StrictPartialOrder root containing all submodels as nodes add edges accordingly

Name: Validation - PE

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: CommunityAffiliationAdjustment may represent subtle bias giving advantage its basically same as cultural fit evaluation but flagged differently

Text: Therefore modeling our processes similarly would involve top level components like LoopSegment followed by some subsequent component SkillSegment XORSegment ManagerSegment FinalSegment each represented as distinct objects added into StrictPartialOrder root nodes list with ordering edges linking them sequentially
